rationale: Both correctly diagnose the None+1 crash from missing extended ratio tokens in the base tokenizer, cite the same file/lines, provide the identical FayeSpica-confirmed DiT workaround, and propose the same None-guard fix — matching the thread closely. Y is slightly better grounded by explicitly citing PR #2713 (the regression source per akshatvishu), which X omits, but Y invents an unverified third 'AR only' config (hunyuan_image3_ar.yaml) and asserts 'Disposition: keep-open,' which contradicts the natural reading of Gaohan123's closing request to track the fix in a new issue. X's more thorough treatment (docs-misleading-header note, explicit fail-fast suggestion, correct resolved/closed disposition) edges out Y despite some unverified header-text claims of its own.
